main-capability.description: Grants the main window IPC access to Velo's Tauri commands when loaded from the remote Cloudflare Pages origin, or from the loopback origin frontend_loader.rs serves the local UI cache from when VELO_PAGES_URL is unreachable at startup (Phase 6.1b). Tauri v2 denies IPC to remote content by default, so this is required for push_frame, get_user_config, and save_user_config to work in either case. If the Pages domain ever changes away from cetrei.dev, update the remote.urls pattern here to match, since this file cannot read VELO_PAGES_URL from .env. The loopback entry uses a wildcard port since frontend_loader.rs picks a free port at runtime via portpicker.
